title: Fish kill crisis in Ramon, Isabela: Million-peso losses due to low oxygen levels
snippet: RAMON, Isabela — Fish cage operators and workers have incurred million-peso losses due to a massive fish kill caused by low oxygen level at the Magat Dam in this town.

title: ₱500K Stolen in Broad Daylight Robbery Hold-Up in Jones, Isabela | Bombo Radyo Philippines
snippet: An estimated ₱500,000 was stolen by riding-in-tandem suspects during a robbery hold-up in Jones, Isabela on July 13, 2025, at around 2:45 p.m.

title: Reward offered, manhunt ordered in killing of Isabela beauty queen - Brigada News
snippet: Isabela offers reward after beauty queen Lullete Ramilo-de Guzman killed; police launch manhunt ordered by PNP chief.

title: DILG to Probe Isabela Gov. Albano’s Germany Trip Amid Super Typhoon Uwan | Bombo Radyo Philippines
snippet: DILG to probe Isabela Governor Albano Germany trip amid Super Typhoon Uwan, drawing criticism over timing and remarks to residents.

title: Typhoon Paolo Slams Isabela; Signal No. 4 Raised Over Northern Luzon | Bombo Radyo Philippines
snippet: Typhoon Paolo Signal No. 4 raised over Isabela and nearby provinces; PAGASA warns of storm surges and destructive winds.

title: Newly built Cabagan-Santa Maria bridge collapses in Isabela - Brigada News
snippet: A portion of the Cabagan-Santa Maria Bridge in Isabela collapsed, affecting multiple vehicles. Authorities are investigating the cause of the incident.
road_place: A portion of the Cabagan-Santa Maria Bridge
display_name: Santa Maria, Isabela, Cagayan Valley, Philippines
